title: bupleurum longifolium
intro: Bupleurum longifolium, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or Hare's ear, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to China and other parts of East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. Bupleurum longifolium is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as exerting antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. It is often used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally consumed to promote overall health and well-being.
